overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a futuristic cyberpunk nightclub illuminated by vibrant purple and cyan neon lights. The character descends from an upper level, crosses through crowds of NPCs in the main lounge area, and approaches a restroom entrance.

segments.scene_description: The character descends a stairway into a futuristic nightclub bathed in purple and cyan neon light. The ceiling features a grid of glowing panels, and a holographic bar structure is visible in the center of the room ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character moves across the open dance floor, passing scattered groups of NPCs. The camera turns toward lounge seating booths on the right, revealing neon wall signage and a restroom sign ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the restroom entrance, passing a vending machine and a seated NPC. The scene narrows as the character walks through the glowing doorway into the restroom.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high vantage point down into the heart of a vibrant cyberpunk nightclub and through to a secluded interior. It begins as the character descends a stairway into a space bathed in purple and cyan neon light, moving beneath a grid of glowing ceiling panels toward a central holographic bar. As the character crosses the open dance floor and passes scattered groups of NPCs, the camera shifts toward lounge seating booths and neon wall signage. The scene then narrows as the character passes a vending machine and a seated guest, finally moving through a glowing doorway and into the restroom.
